summary: Decent soundboard capture of a solid 1983 City Island show that fans remember as good.
review: The recording appears to be sourced from the soundboard and, while no technical details are provided, it is presumed to have acceptable clarity for a 1983 tape. An attendee who was at the concert rates the performance four stars and describes it simply as "a good one," indicating an overall positive musical impression despite the lack of specific song commentary.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single brief review was available; it gives a 4‑star rating and a positive comment, suggesting both the show and recording are at least good but without detailed evidence to justify a higher score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit remarks on sound quality; assumed typical decent soundboard fidelity for a 1983 recording.
